milestones.name: v4.21.0 - Platform Stability & Enterprise Integration
milestones.description: OpenShift 4.21 compatibility release with deprecation remediation, platform expansion, and RHACM integration. Critical path: ImageDigestMirrorSet migration, OVNKubernetes enforcement, Nutanix/External platform support, two-node topologies, and Hub cluster deployment targets.

milestones.name: v4.22.0 - AI/ML Readiness & Forward Compatibility
milestones.description: OpenShift 4.22 compatibility release with ContainerRuntimeConfig for AI/ML storage optimization, HyperShift GA support, expanded E2E test matrix, and developer experience improvements. Tech preview features gated behind tech_preview_enabled flag.
